steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to compare the number of native versus non-native seed species catalogued. The notes give exact counts from the 2019 study: 15 native species and 29 non-native species. The correct answer must present that numerical relationship directly.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Seeds from *Leptecophylla tameiameiae* and *Passiflora suberosa* can be found in Oahu, Hawaii, but only the former plant is native.": Lists individual species but never gives the counts needed to make the comparison. ✗
  • "In 2019, researchers catalogued native and non-native plant seeds found in fecal samples from non-native birds.": Refers to the 2019 study but omits the species counts entirely. ✗
  • "Most of the birds in Oahu, Hawaii, are non-native, and researchers have concluded that they play a vital role in seed dispersal.": Shifts focus to birds rather than the seed-species comparison the student needs. ✗
  • "When cataloguing plant seeds found in bird fecal samples, researchers found more non-native seed species than native species.": Directly states the numerical relationship using the data from the notes. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
